name: (reserved)
description: Reserved (the null identifier). MUST NOT be used as a protocol_id; a receiver MUST reject a BridgeEnvelope whose protocol_id is 0x00 with EnvelopeMalformed (NPAMP-BRIDGE transport error code 1). NPAMP-REG Sections 4 and 9.

name: MCP - Model Context Protocol
description: Standards-assigned; named directly by NPAMP-BRIDGE and recorded in NPAMP-REG Section 6; MUST NOT be reassigned.

name: A2A - Agent2Agent
description: Standards-assigned; named directly by NPAMP-BRIDGE and recorded in NPAMP-REG Section 6; MUST NOT be reassigned.

name: HTTP/2 generic carriage
description: Standards-assigned; named directly by NPAMP-BRIDGE and recorded in NPAMP-REG Section 6; MUST NOT be reassigned.

name: WebSocket generic carriage
description: Standards-assigned; named directly by NPAMP-BRIDGE and recorded in NPAMP-REG Section 6; MUST NOT be reassigned.

name: (unassigned)
description: Unassigned standards range; available under the Specification Required policy of RFC 8126 via the registration procedure of NPAMP-REG Section 8.

name: (experimental)
description: Experimental range; usable without registration; carries no guaranteed cross-domain meaning; a sender MUST NOT use it without out-of-band agreement with the peer. NPAMP-REG Section 7.1.

name: (private use)
description: Private-use range; usable within a single administrative domain without registration; never assigned by this registry; MUST NOT be emitted toward a peer outside that domain. NPAMP-REG Section 7.2.
